title: Nether Mooshrooms
description: Crimson and Warped variants of the more common overworld mooshroom types.
body:
![Nether Mooshrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lCQ9iKoS/images/214ba7ca50f3c5b83123c764bb77e5ff28cab96b.png)

Crimson and Warped variants of the more common overworld moonshroom types, mechanic and behavior wise these new variants act exactly like their overworld counterparts.

Both crimson and warped variants are tempted and breed by nether wart.
Feeding either variant a fungus of the opposite type will transform the mooshroom.

![Requires Fabric API](https://images2.imgbox.com/8e/38/bfInI5qv_o.png)
